PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?pm ?pmLabel WHERE {
  ?pm wdt:P39 wd:Q214815 .
  ?pm rdfs:label ?pmLabel .
  ?pm wdt:P145 ?description .
  FILTER(LANG(?pmLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(LANG(?description) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?description) , 'affair') || CONTAINS(LCASE(?description) , 'infidelity') || CONTAINS(LCASE(?description) , 'scandal') || CONTAINS(LCASE(?description) , 'adultery'))
}
